name: raycast-window-layout
title: Window Layout Restore
description: Raycast extension to save and restore named macOS window layouts via yabai.
author: TkDodo

commands.name: save-layout
commands.title: Save Layout
commands.subtitle: Capture the current window arrangement
commands.description: Save the current display, Space, and window arrangement into a named layout.

commands.name: restore-layout
commands.title: Restore Layout
commands.subtitle: Apply a saved layout
commands.description: Restore a saved layout by moving current windows onto their saved displays, Spaces, and frames.

commands.name: manage-layouts
commands.title: Manage Layouts
commands.subtitle: Rename, delete, export, or import
commands.description: Manage saved layouts and inspect or transfer their JSON definitions.
